hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Casa Rural La MadroÃ±a in Fuenlabrada de los Montes offers four-star comfort with family rooms and pet-friendly amenities. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and free WiFi throughout the property.
Leisure Facilities: The country house features a saltwater swimming pool, sun terrace, and lush garden. Additional amenities include an outdoor fireplace, hot tub, and barbecue facilities. Free toiletries and a work desk enhance the stay.
Dining Options: A shared kitchen offers a variety of dining options, including special diet menus. Outdoor seating areas and a picnic area provide relaxing spaces for guests.
Activities and Services: Guests can enjoy pub crawls, cycling, and tour desk services.

hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: La Calderera in Talarrubias offers four bedrooms and four bathrooms. The property includes a fully equipped kitchen, air-conditioning, and a private pool. Guests can relax in the garden and enjoy scenic views.
Modern Amenities: The holiday home features free WiFi, a washing machine, and a work desk. Additional amenities include a TV, hairdryer, and wardrobe, ensuring a comfortable stay.
Convenient Location: Located 154 km from Badajoz Airport, La Calderera provides easy access to local attractions. Reception staff speak Spanish, assisting guests with their needs.
